case_title: CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORPORATION vs. ERWIN, MARSHALL et al

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORPORATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-26-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 05 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-31-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

JUDGE CARLOS LAROCHE LELA M. HARRIS, ATTY FOR PLTF. MARSHAL ERWIN, DEFT. IN PROPER 10:30 AM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. IN CHAMBERS, CASE SETTLED, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD BY COURT AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT. FOR POSS- ESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 385 EDDY ST, #504, IN SF. DEFT. TO VACATE PREMISES 10/1/93 MIDNIGHT. WRIT MAY ISSUE AND POSTED THURSDAY, 9/30/93. ALL PAST DUE RENT IS FORGIVEN. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS/FEES. NO IMPUNITY OF DEFT'S CHARACTER, THAT IS PLTF. WILL NOIT COMMENT ONE WAY OR ANOTHER. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERWIN, MARSHALL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 385 EDDY STREET, #504, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-01-1993, LEASE FORFEITED
